docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) CYNTHIA M. CHAVEZ FILED BY DEFENDANT BMO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-27-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHILOVA, LARISA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BMO MS. SHILOVA DID NOT MEET HER BURDEN OF PROOF. DESPITE REPRESENTING THAT SHE WAS NEVER INFORMED THAT HER WORK PERFORMANCE WAS INADEQUATE, MS. SHILOVA'S EVIDENCE INCLUDED A PERFORMANCE IMPROVEMENT NOTICE THAT LISTED 5 INSTANCES WHERE SHE VIOLATED COMPANY POLICY. THE NOTICE WAS DATED 7/5/23. THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVE THAT SHE WAS WRONGFULLY TERMINATED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SHILOVA, LARISA AS TO DEFENDANT BMO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-17-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHILOVA, LARISA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR CYNTHIA M. CHAVEZ FILED BY DEFENDANT BMO
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT BMO
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL IS GRANTED/*** PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-17-2025 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-27-2025 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-27-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-27-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF LARISA SHILOVA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BMO IS REPRESENTED BY CYNTHIA M. CHAVEZ IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
